<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="zh-TW">

<head>

<meta charset="UTF-8">

<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

<title>續發國際貿易 | Constant Fortune International</title>

<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700;900&family=Noto+Serif+TC:wght@300;400;700&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>

  :root {

    --gold: #C9A84C;

    --gold-light: #E8CC7A;

    --gold-pale: #F5E9C8;

    --dark: #1A1108;

    --charcoal: #2C2416;

    --mid: #6B5B3E;

    --cream: #FAF6EE;

    --white: #FFFFFF;

    --accent-red: #8B1A1A;

  }


  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }


  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }


  body {

    font-family: 'Inter', 'Noto Serif TC', sans-serif;

    background: var(--cream);

    color: var(--dark);

    overflow-x: hidden;

  }


  /* LANGUAGE SWITCHER */

  #lang-bar {

    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 1000;

    background: var(--dark);

    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;

    padding: 0 2rem;

    height: 44px;

  }

  #lang-bar .brand-mini {

    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;

    color: var(--gold);

    font-size: 0.85rem;

    letter-spacing: 0.1em;

  }

  .lang-btns { display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; }

  .lang-btn {

    background: none; border: 1px solid var(--gold);

    color: var(--gold-light); font-size: 0.75rem;

    padding: 3px 12px; cursor: pointer;

    letter-spacing: 0.08em;

    transition: all 0.2s;

  }

  .lang-btn.active, .lang-btn:hover {

    background: var(--gold); color: var(--dark); font-weight: 600;

  }


  /* NAV */

  nav {

    position: fixed; top: 44px; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 999;

    background: rgba(26,17,8,0.96);

    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);

    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;

    padding: 0 3rem;

    height: 64px;

    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3);

  }

  .nav-logo {

    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;

    color: var(--gold);

    font-size: 1.3rem;

    letter-spacing: 0.05em;

    text-decoration: none;

  }

  .nav-logo span { font-size: 0.75rem; display: block; color: var(--gold-light); letter-spacing: 0.15em; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; }

  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; }

  .nav-links a {

    color: rgba(250,246,238,0.8);

    text-decoration: none;

    font-size: 0.82rem;

    letter-spacing: 0.1em;

    transition: color 0.2s;

  }

  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--gold); }


  /* HERO */

  #hero {

    min-height: 100vh;

    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1A1108 0%, #2C1A08 50%, #1A1108 100%);

    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

    position: relative; overflow: hidden;

    padding-top: 108px;

  }

  .hero-orb {

    position: absolute;

    border-radius: 50%;

    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(201,168,76,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%);

    pointer-events: none;

  }

  .hero-orb-1 { width: 600px; height: 600px; top: -100px; right: -100px; }

  .hero-orb-2 { width: 400px; height: 400px; bottom: -50px; left: -50px; }


  .hero-inner {

    text-align: center;

    position: relative; z-index: 1;

    max-width: 900px;

    padding: 0 2rem;

  }

  .hero-eyebrow {

    font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.3em;

    color: var(--gold);

    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;

    text-transform: uppercase;

  }

  .hero-title {

    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;

    font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 5rem);

    font-weight: 900;

    color: var(--white);

    line-height: 1.1;

    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;

  }

  .hero-title-zh {

    font-family: 'Noto Serif TC', serif;

    font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 3rem);

    font-weight: 700;

    color: var(--gold-light);

    margin-bottom: 2rem;

  }

  .hero-divider {

    width: 80px; height: 2px;

    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--gold), transparent);

    margin: 0 auto 2rem;

  }

  .hero-tagline {

    font-size: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.25rem);

    color: rgba(250,246,238,0.75);

    line-height: 1.7;

    max-width: 600px;

    margin: 0 auto 3rem;

  }

  .hero-stats {

    display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 3rem;

    flex-wrap: wrap;

  }

  .hero-stat { text-align: center; }

  .hero-stat-num {

    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;

    font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 900;

    color: var(--gold);

    display: block;

  }

  .hero-stat-label {

    font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em;

    color: rgba(250,246,238,0.6);

    text-transform: uppercase;

    margin-top: 4px;

  }

  .hero-cta {

    display: inline-block; margin-top: 3rem;

    padding: 14px 40px;

    background: transparent;

    border: 1.5px solid var(--gold);

    color: var(--gold);

    font-size: 0.82rem;

    letter-spacing: 0.2em;

    text-decoration: none;

    text-transform: uppercase;

    transition: all 0.3s;

  }

  .hero-cta:hover { background: var(--gold); color: var(--dark); }


  /* SECTION SHARED */

  section { padding: 100px 0; }

  .container { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2.5rem; }

  .section-label {

    font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.35em;

    color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase;

    margin-bottom: 1rem;

  }

  .section-title {

    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;

    font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3.5vw, 2.8rem);

    font-weight: 700;

    color: var(--dark);

    line-height: 1.2;

    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;

  }

  .section-title-zh {

    font-family: 'Noto Serif TC', serif;

    font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 2.5vw, 1.8rem);

    color: var(--mid);

    margin-bottom: 2rem;

  }

  .gold-rule { width: 50px; height: 2px; background: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 2.5rem; }


  /* ABOUT */

  #about { background: var(--cream); }

  .about-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 5rem; align-items: center; }

  .about-text p {

    font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.9;

    color: var(--charcoal);

    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;

  }

  .about-palace {

    background: var(--dark);

    padding: 2.5rem;

    position: relative;

    overflow: hidden;

  }

  .about-palace::before {

    content: '';

    position: absolute; inset: 0;

    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(201,168,76,0.1), transparent);

  }

  .about-palace-title {

    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;

    font-size: 1.4rem; color: var(--gold);

    margin-bottom: 1rem; position: relative;

  }

  .about-palace p {

    font-size: 0.88rem; line-height: 1.8;

    color: rgba(250,246,238,0.75);

    position: relative;

  }

  .about-palace .palace-tag {

    display: inline-block;

    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.4);

    color: var(--gold-light);

    font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em;

    padding: 4px 12px;

    margin-bottom: 1rem;

  }


  /* PRODUCTS */

  #products { background: var(--dark); }

  #products .section-title { color: var(--white); }

  #products .section-label { color: var(--gold); }

  .products-grid {

    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));

    gap: 1.5px;

    margin-top: 3rem;

    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.15);

  }

  .product-card {

    background: #1F160A;

    padding: 2.5rem 2rem;

    transition: background 0.3s;

    cursor: default;

  }

  .product-card:hover { background: #2C1A08; }

  .product-icon {

    width: 44px; height: 44px;

    border: 1px solid var(--gold);

    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;

    color: var(--gold);

    font-size: 1.2rem;

  }

  .product-card h3 {

    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;

    font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--gold-light);

    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;

  }

  .product-card p {

    font-size: 0.8rem; line-height: 1.7;

    color: rgba(250,246,238,0.55);

  }


  /* MARKETS */

  #markets { background: #F0E8D6; }

  .markets-countries {

    display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.75rem;

    margin-top: 2.5rem;

  }

  .country-tag {

    padding: 6px 16px;

    border: 1px solid var(--gold);

    font-size: 0.78rem;

    color: var(--charcoal);

    letter-spacing: 0.08em;

    transition: all 0.2s;

  }

  .country-tag:hover { background: var(--gold); color: var(--dark); }

  .markets-headline {

    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;

    font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 6rem);

    font-weight: 900;

    color: var(--gold);

    opacity: 0.15;

    line-height: 1;

    margin-bottom: -1rem;

  }


  /* BRANDS */

  #brands { background: var(--cream); }

  .brands-row {

    display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1.5rem;

    margin-top: 2.5rem;

  }

  .brand-badge {

    padding: 10px 24px;

    background: var(--dark);

    color: var(--gold-light);

    font-size: 0.82rem;

    font-weight: 600;

    letter-spacing: 0.15em;

    text-transform: uppercase;

  }


  /* VALUES */

  #values { background: var(--dark); }

  #values .section-title { color: var(--white); }

  .values-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 2rem; margin-top: 3rem; }

  .value-item { text-align: center; padding: 2.5rem 1.5rem; }

  .value-num {

    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;

    font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 900;

    color: rgba(201,168,76,0.15);

    line-height: 1;

    margin-bottom: 1rem;

  }

  .value-item h3 {

    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;

    color: var(--gold-light);

    font-size: 1.1rem;

    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;

  }

  .value-item p {

    font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.8;

    color: rgba(250,246,238,0.55);

  }


  /* PRESIDENT */

  #president { background: #F0E8D6; }

  .president-layout { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr; gap: 4rem; align-items: start; }

  .president-card {

    background: var(--dark); padding: 2.5rem;

    text-align: center;

  }

  .president-name {

    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;

    font-size: 1.5rem; color: var(--gold);

    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;

  }

  .president-name-zh {

    font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--gold-light);

    font-family: 'Noto Serif TC', serif;

    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;

  }

  .president-title {

    font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em;

    color: rgba(250,246,238,0.5);

    text-transform: uppercase;

    border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3);

    padding-top: 1rem; margin-top: 1rem;

  }

  .president-quote {

    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;

    font-size: 1.3rem;

    color: var(--charcoal);

    line-height: 1.6;

    font-style: italic;

    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;

    border-left: 3px solid var(--gold);

    padding-left: 1.5rem;

  }

  .president-body p {

    font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.9;

    color: var(--charcoal);

    margin-bottom: 1rem;

  }


  /* CONTACT */

  #contact { background: var(--dark); }

  #contact .section-title { color: var(--white); }

  .contact-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 4rem; margin-top: 3rem; }

  .contact-info { }

  .contact-item {

    display: flex; gap: 1.2rem;

    margin-bottom: 2rem;

    align-items: flex-start;

  }

  .contact-icon {

    width: 40px; height: 40px; flex-shrink: 0;

    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.4);

    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

    color: var(--gold); font-size: 1rem;

  }

  .contact-item-text strong {

    display: block;

    font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em;

    color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase;

    margin-bottom: 4px;

  }

  .contact-item-text span {

    font-size: 0.88rem; color: rgba(250,246,238,0.7);

    line-height: 1.6;

  }

  .contact-item-text a {

    color: rgba(250,246,238,0.7); text-decoration: none;

  }

  .contact-item-text a:hover { color: var(--gold); }

  .contact-form { }

  .form-group { margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }

  .form-group input,

  .form-group textarea {

    width: 100%;

    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);

    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.25);

    color: var(--cream);

    padding: 12px 16px;

    font-size: 0.88rem;

    font-family: inherit;

    transition: border-color 0.2s;

    outline: none;

  }

  .form-group input:focus,

  .form-group textarea:focus { border-color: var(--gold); }

  .form-group textarea { height: 120px; resize: vertical; }

  .form-group input::placeholder,

  .form-group textarea::placeholder { color: rgba(250,246,238,0.3); }

  .form-submit {

    width: 100%; padding: 14px;

    background: var(--gold);

    border: none; cursor: pointer;

    font-size: 0.82rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em;

    font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase;

    color: var(--dark);

    transition: background 0.2s;

  }

  .form-submit:hover { background: var(--gold-light); }


  /* FOOTER */

  footer {

    background: #0D0A04;

    padding: 2rem 0;

    text-align: center;

    border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.15);

  }

  footer p {

    font-size: 0.75rem; color: rgba(250,246,238,0.35);

    letter-spacing: 0.08em;

  }

  footer .footer-gold { color: var(--gold); }


  /* LANGUAGE TOGGLE */

  .zh { display: block; }

  .en { display: none; }

  body.lang-en .zh { display: none; }

  body.lang-en .en { display: block; }


  /* For inline elements */

  .zh-inline { display: inline; }

  .en-inline { display: none; }

  body.lang-en .zh-inline { display: none; }

  body.lang-en .en-inline { display: inline; }


  @media (max-width: 768px) {

    .about-grid, .president-layout, .contact-grid, .values-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; }

    .hero-stats { gap: 1.5rem; }

    nav { padding: 0 1.5rem; }

    .nav-links { display: none; }

    section { padding: 60px 0; }

  }

</style>

</head>

<body>


<!-- LANGUAGE BAR -->

<div id="lang-bar">

  <div class="brand-mini">CONSTANT FORTUNE INTERNATIONAL</div>

  <div class="lang-btns">

    <button class="lang-btn active" onclick="setLang('zh')" id="btn-zh">中文</button>

    <button class="lang-btn" onclick="setLang('en')" id="btn-en">EN</button>

  </div>

</div>


<!-- NAV -->

<nav>

  <a href="#hero" class="nav-logo">

    續發國際貿易

    <span>CONSTANT FORTUNE INTERNATIONAL</span>

  </a>

  <ul class="nav-links">

    <li><a href="#about"><span class="zh-inline">關於我們</span><span class="en-inline">About</span></a></li>

    <li><a href="#products"><span class="zh-inline">產品項目</span><span class="en-inline">Products</span></a></li>

    <li><a href="#markets"><span class="zh-inline">全球版圖</span><span class="en-inline">Global Markets</span></a></li>

    <li><a href="#gallery"><span class="zh-inline">公司環境</span><span class="en-inline">Gallery</span></a></li>

    <li><a href="#brands"><span class="zh-inline">合作品牌</span><span class="en-inline">Partners</span></a></li>

    <li><a href="#president"><span class="zh-inline">董事長</span><span class="en-inline">President</span></a></li>

    <li><a href="#contact"><span class="zh-inline">聯絡我們</span><span class="en-inline">Contact</span></a></li>

  </ul>

</nav>


<!-- HERO -->

<section id="hero">

  <div class="hero-orb hero-orb-1"></div>

  <div class="hero-orb hero-orb-2"></div>

  <div class="hero-inner">

    <p class="hero-eyebrow">

      <span class="zh-inline">台灣彰化 · Est. 1992</span>

      <span class="en-inline">Changhua, Taiwan · Est. 1992</span>

    </p>

    <h1 class="hero-title">Constant Fortune<br>International</h1>

    <div class="hero-title-zh">

      <span class="zh-inline">續發國際貿易有限公司</span>

      <span class="en-inline">Co., Ltd.</span>

    </div>

    <div class="hero-divider"></div>

    <p class="hero-tagline">

      <span class="zh">立足台灣彰化，供應全球時尚。<br>超過30年深耕鞋材產業，成為世界知名品牌背後的隱形冠軍。</span>

      <span class="en">Rooted in Changhua, Taiwan. Supplying global fashion.<br>Over 30 years of expertise in shoe materials — the invisible champion behind the world's leading brands.</span>

    </p>

    <div class="hero-stats">

      <div class="hero-stat">

        <span class="hero-stat-num">30+</span>

        <span class="hero-stat-label"><span class="zh-inline">年產業經驗</span><span class="en-inline">Years Experience</span></span>

      </div>

      <div class="hero-stat">

        <span class="hero-stat-num">60+</span>

        <span class="hero-stat-label"><span class="zh-inline">出口國家</span><span class="en-inline">Countries Served</span></span>

      </div>

      <div class="hero-stat">

        <span class="hero-stat-num">1992</span>

        <span class="hero-stat-label"><span class="zh-inline">創立年份</span><span class="en-inline">Founded</span></span>

      </div>

    </div>

    <a href="#about" class="hero-cta">

      <span class="zh-inline">了解更多</span><span class="en-inline">Discover More</span>

    </a>

  </div>

</section>


<!-- ABOUT -->

<section id="about">

  <div class="container">

    <div class="about-grid">

      <div class="about-text">

        <p class="section-label"><span class="zh-inline">關於我們</span><span class="en-inline">About Us</span></p>

        <h2 class="section-title">

          <span class="zh">彰化走向世界</span>

          <span class="en">From Changhua to the World</span>

        </h2>

        <div class="gold-rule"></div>

        <div class="zh">

          <p>續發國際貿易有限公司（Constant Fortune International）成立於1992年，位於台灣彰化市，是台灣最具規模的鞋材製造與出口商之一。</p>

          <p>我們不只是材料供應商——我們是全球時尚供應鏈的策略夥伴，攜手 Timberland、Adidas、Lacoste、ECCO 等國際知名品牌，共同打造世界級的鞋業產品。</p>

          <p>秉持「誠信第一、永續經營」的核心理念，我們在超過60個國家建立穩固的合作關係，以品質和信用贏得客戶長達三十年的信任。</p>

        </div>

        <div class="en">

          <p>Founded in 1992, Constant Fortune International Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Changhua City, Taiwan, and stands as one of the largest shoe material manufacturers and exporters in the country.</p>

          <p>We are more than a materials supplier — we are a strategic partner in the global fashion supply chain, collaborating with internationally renowned brands including Timberland, Adidas, Lacoste, and ECCO.</p>

          <p>Guided by the principles of integrity and sustainable growth, we have built enduring partnerships across more than 60 countries, earning decades of client trust through consistent quality and reliability.</p>

        </div>

      </div>

            <div class="about-palace" style="padding:0;overflow:hidden;">

alt="續發國際貿易總部" style="width:100%;display:block;border-bottom:2px solid #C9A84C;">

        <div style="padding:2rem;position:relative;">

          <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(201,168,76,0.08),transparent);pointer-events:none;"></div>

          <div class="palace-tag" style="position:relative;">

            <span class="zh-inline">台版金皇宮</span><span class="en-inline">Taiwan Golden Palace HQ</span>

          </div>

          <div class="about-palace-title" style="position:relative;">

            <span class="zh">企業總部</span><span class="en">Our Headquarters</span>

          </div>

          <p class="zh" style="position:relative;">融合日本、德國、義大利建材精華，歷時五年精心打造的「台版金皇宮」，是我們招待全球合作夥伴的驕傲舞台。整棟建築具備頂級耐震、防火、防水等科技環保功能，流線型金色裝飾與水晶燈飾貫穿全樓，盡顯奢華品味。</p>

          <p class="en" style="position:relative;">Our headquarters, affectionately known as the "Taiwan Golden Palace," was meticulously crafted over five years, integrating premium building materials from Japan, Germany, and Italy.</p>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>

  </div>

</section>



<!-- GALLERY -->

<section id="gallery" style="background:#0D0A04;padding:80px 0;">

  <div class="container">

    <p class="section-label"><span class="zh-inline">金皇宮內部</span><span class="en-inline">Inside the Palace</span></p>

    <h2 class="section-title" style="color:var(--white);">

      <span class="zh">奢華辦公環境</span>

      <span class="en">A Workplace Like No Other</span>

    </h2>

    <div class="gold-rule"></div>

    <div style="margin-top:2rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;">

      <!-- Ballroom full width -->

alt="蔡慧惠媒體採訪" style="width:100%;display:block;object-fit:cover;max-height:420px;">

        <div style="background:var(--dark);display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:2.5rem;">

          <p class="section-label" style="margin-bottom:0.75rem;"><span class="zh-inline">媒體報導</span><span class="en-inline">Media Coverage</span></p>

          <p class="zh" style="color:rgba(250,246,238,0.75);font-size:0.88rem;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:1.5rem;">總部落成典禮吸引新唐人亞太台專題報導，蔡慧惠董座親受媒體採訪，分享33年誠信經營之道。</p>

          <p class="en" style="color:rgba(250,246,238,0.75);font-size:0.88rem;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:1.5rem;">The HQ inauguration was featured on NTD Asia Pacific. President Jinny Tsai shared her 33-year journey of integrity and global vision.</p>

          <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C3Yb34PwRT8" target="_blank" rel="noopener"

             style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:0.6rem;padding:10px 20px;border:1.5px solid var(--gold);color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none;font-size:0.78rem;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;width:fit-content;"

             onmouseover="this.style.background='#C9A84C';this.style.color='#1A1108';"

             onmouseout="this.style.background='transparent';this.style.color='#C9A84C';">

            ▶ <span class="zh-inline">觀看報導</span><span class="en-inline">Watch Feature</span>

          </a>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>

  </div>

</section>




<!-- PRODUCTS -->

<section id="products">

  <div class="container">

    <p class="section-label"><span class="zh-inline">產品項目</span><span class="en-inline">Our Products</span></p>

    <h2 class="section-title">

      <span class="zh">鞋材全方位供應</span>

      <span class="en">Comprehensive Shoe Material Solutions</span>

    </h2>

    <div class="products-grid">

      <div class="product-card">

        <div class="product-icon">◈</div>

        <h3><span class="zh-inline">織布類</span><span class="en-inline">Textile</span></h3>

        <p><span class="zh">網布、氣孔網布、Cambrelle、不織布、帆布、仿麂皮、針織布、微纖維等。</span><span class="en">Mesh, Air Mesh, Cambrelle, Non Woven, Canvas, Micro Suede, Knitted Fabric, Microfiber and more.</span></p>

      </div>

      <div class="product-card">

        <div class="product-icon">⬡</div>

        <h3><span class="zh-inline">五金配件</span><span class="en-inline">Hardware</span></h3>

        <p><span class="zh">扣環、雞眼、鉚釘、裝飾件、D型環、勾扣、金屬標誌、撞釘等各式五金。</span><span class="en">Buckle, Eyelet, Rivet, Ornament, D-Ring, Hook, Metal Logo, Snap Button and more.</span></p>

      </div>

      <div class="product-card">

        <div class="product-icon">◉</div>

        <h3><span class="zh-inline">合成皮革</span><span class="en-inline">Synthetic</span></h3>

        <p><span class="zh">PU、PVC、超細纖維、防水PU等多種合成材料。</span><span class="en">PU, PVC, Micro Fiber, Non-Wicking PU and various synthetic materials.</span></p>

      </div>

      <div class="product-card">

        <div class="product-icon">⊞</div>

        <h3><span class="zh-inline">輔料配件</span><span class="en-inline">Accessories</span></h3>

        <p><span class="zh">魔鬼氈、拉鍊、鞋帶、蠟繩、織帶等。</span><span class="en">Velcro, Zipper, Shoe Lace, Waxed Lace, Webbing and more.</span></p>

      </div>

      <div class="product-card">

        <div class="product-icon">▣</div>

        <h3><span class="zh-inline">內底材料</span><span class="en-inline">Board & Foam</span></h3>

        <p><span class="zh">紙板、乳膠海綿、仿毛、各式底材。</span><span class="en">Paper Board, Latex Sponge, Faux Fur and various insole materials.</span></p>

      </div>

      <div class="product-card">

        <div class="product-icon">✦</div>

        <h3><span class="zh-inline">客製服務</span><span class="en-inline">Custom Solutions</span></h3>

        <p><span class="zh">依客戶需求提供客製化開發、樣品打樣、配色選色等全方位服務。</span><span class="en">Custom development, sample prototyping, color matching, and full-service support tailored to client specifications.</span></p>

      </div>

    </div>

  </div>

</section>


<!-- MARKETS -->

<section id="markets">

  <div class="container">

    <div class="markets-headline">60+</div>

    <p class="section-label"><span class="zh-inline">全球版圖</span><span class="en-inline">Global Reach</span></p>

    <h2 class="section-title">

      <span class="zh">外銷超過60個國家</span>

      <span class="en">Exporting to Over 60 Countries</span>

    </h2>

    <div class="gold-rule"></div>

    <p style="font-size:0.92rem;color:var(--charcoal);line-height:1.8;max-width:600px;">

      <span class="zh">我們的鞋材產品遍布全球，涵蓋歐洲、亞洲、大洋洲、中東、中美洲及東歐等地區的知名鞋業市場。</span>

      <span class="en">Our shoe materials reach markets across Europe, Asia, Oceania, the Middle East, Central America, and Eastern Europe.</span>

    </p>

    <div class="markets-countries">

      <div class="country-tag">🇩🇪 Germany</div>

      <div class="country-tag">🇦🇺 Australia</div>

      <div class="country-tag">🇻🇳 Vietnam</div>

      <div class="country-tag">🇮🇩 Indonesia</div>

      <div class="country-tag">🇵🇹 Portugal</div>

      <div class="country-tag">🇨🇳 China</div>

      <div class="country-tag">🇵🇭 Philippines</div>

      <div class="country-tag">🇦🇪 Dubai</div>

      <div class="country-tag">🇩🇴 Dominican Rep.</div>

      <div class="country-tag">🇷🇺 Russia</div>

      <div class="country-tag">🇮🇳 India</div>

      <div class="country-tag">🇲🇾 Malaysia</div>

      <div class="country-tag">🇹🇭 Thailand</div>

      <div class="country-tag">🇭🇰 Hong Kong</div>

      <div class="country-tag">+ <span class="zh-inline">更多國家</span><span class="en-inline">& more</span></div>

    </div>

  </div>

</section>


<!-- BRANDS -->

<section id="brands">

  <div class="container">

    <p class="section-label"><span class="zh-inline">合作夥伴</span><span class="en-inline">Strategic Partners</span></p>

    <h2 class="section-title">

      <span class="zh">世界知名品牌的信賴之選</span>

      <span class="en">Trusted by the World's Leading Brands</span>

    </h2>

    <div class="gold-rule"></div>

    <p style="font-size:0.92rem;color:var(--charcoal);line-height:1.8;max-width:580px;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">

      <span class="zh">我們的鞋材被用於全球多個頂尖品牌的生產線，以品質與誠信成就長達三十年的夥伴關係。</span>

      <span class="en">Our materials are used by some of the world's most iconic footwear brands, with partnerships built on quality and integrity spanning over three decades.</span>

    </p>

    <div class="brands-row">

      <div class="brand-badge">TIMBERLAND</div>

      <div class="brand-badge">ADIDAS</div>

      <div class="brand-badge">LACOSTE</div>

      <div class="brand-badge">ECCO</div>

    </div>

  </div>

</section>


<!-- VALUES -->

<section id="values">

  <div class="container">

    <p class="section-label"><span class="zh-inline">經營理念</span><span class="en-inline">Our Values</span></p>

    <h2 class="section-title">

      <span class="zh">成功的根基</span>

      <span class="en">The Foundation of Success</span>

    </h2>

    <div class="values-grid">

      <div class="value-item">

        <div class="value-num">01</div>

        <h3><span class="zh-inline">誠信第一</span><span class="en-inline">Integrity First</span></h3>

        <p><span class="zh">說到做到是我們最核心的承諾。無論對客戶、廠商或員工，信用始終是我們最珍貴的資產。</span><span class="en">We keep every promise made. Whether to clients, suppliers, or employees, our word is our most prized asset.</span></p>

      </div>

      <div class="value-item">

        <div class="value-num">02</div>

        <h3><span class="zh-inline">品質卓越</span><span class="en-inline">Quality Excellence</span></h3>

        <p><span class="zh">所有產品以100%真實品質交付，導入最先進的研發團隊，確保每一批材料符合最嚴格的標準。</span><span class="en">All products are delivered with 100% authentic quality. Our best-in-class R&D team ensures every material batch meets the strictest standards.</span></p>

      </div>

      <div class="value-item">

        <div class="value-num">03</div>

        <h3><span class="zh-inline">永續共好</span><span class="en-inline">Sustainable Growth</span></h3>

        <p><span class="zh">我們不只追求企業獲利，更積極回饋社會，關懷弱勢族群，致力成為一個「超幸福企業」。</span><span class="en">Beyond profit, we actively give back to society, support vulnerable communities, and strive to be an enterprise defined by genuine happiness and purpose.</span></p>

      </div>

    </div>

  </div>

</section>


<!-- PRESIDENT -->

<section id="president">

  <div class="container">

    <div class="president-layout">

      <div>

BHtRRTIQiADdXE6pLINdOHPB4oooexUNzL1FigLKcF3+Y+tavh6JPNB28k0UVmviOyX8M7S0AMdaC9KKK6Y7HlyH0UUVZJ//2Q==" alt="蔡慧惠 Jinny Tsai" style="width:150px;height:150px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;object-position:top center;border:3px solid #C9A84C;margin:0 auto 1.5rem;display:block;">

          <div class="president-name">Jinny Tsai</div>

          <div class="president-name-zh">蔡慧惠</div>

          <div class="president-title">

            <span class="zh-inline">董事長 · 續發國際貿易</span>

            <span class="en-inline">President · Constant Fortune International</span>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>

      <div class="president-body">

        <p class="section-label"><span class="zh-inline">董事長介紹</span><span class="en-inline">About the President</span></p>

        <h2 class="section-title">

          <span class="zh">從彰化出發，走向世界</span>

          <span class="en">From Changhua to the Global Stage</span>

        </h2>

        <div class="gold-rule"></div>

        <blockquote class="president-quote">

          <span class="zh">「我只要講出來的一定做到，說到做到，這是我最重要的原則。」</span>

          <span class="en">"Whatever I say, I will do. My word is my commitment — that is my most important principle."</span>

        </blockquote>


        <div class="zh">

          <p>蔡慧惠，人稱「天后」，創業逾33年，白手起家建立起台灣鞋材界的金字招牌。她以真誠與熱情對待每一位合作夥伴，讓許多客戶不只是生意夥伴，更成為長達十餘年的好友。</p>

          <p>她不只是成功的企業家，更熱心投入公益活動——關懷社區老人、為學校建設圖書館，用行動實踐「因為我，讓周邊的人更好」的人生哲學。</p>

          <p>蔡慧惠相信，根留台灣、誠信經營，才是企業長久之道。她以彰化為根，以全球60多國為舞台，持續輻射台灣鞋業的影響力。</p>

        </div>

        <div class="en">

          <p>Jinny Tsai, affectionately known as "The Queen," has built one of Taiwan's most respected shoe material companies over more than 33 years. Her genuine warmth and passion turn business partners into lasting friendships that span decades.</p>

          <p>Beyond business, she is deeply committed to social causes — caring for elderly community members and funding school libraries — living her philosophy: "Because of me, the people around me become better."</p>

          <p>Jinny believes that staying rooted in Taiwan and operating with integrity is the only sustainable path forward. From Changhua, she continues to amplify Taiwan's footwear industry influence across more than 60 countries worldwide.</p>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>

  </div>

</section>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>

      <div class="contact-form">

        <div class="form-group">

          <input type="text" placeholder="Name / 姓名">

        </div>

        <div class="form-group">

          <input type="email" placeholder="Email">

        </div>

        <div class="form-group">

          <input type="text" placeholder="Company / 公司名稱">

        </div>

        <div class="form-group">

          <textarea placeholder="Message / 留言"></textarea>

        </div>

        <button class="form-submit" onclick="submitForm(event)">

          <span class="zh-inline">送出詢問</span><span class="en-inline">Send Inquiry</span>

        </button>

      </div>

    </div>

  </div>

</section>


<!-- FOOTER -->

<footer>

  <p>

    © 2024 <span class="footer-gold">續發國際貿易有限公司 · Constant Fortune International Co., Ltd.</span><br>

    <span class="zh-inline">彰化市埔西街85號 · TEL: +886-4-7112199</span>

    <span class="en-inline">No.85 Puxi St., Changhua City, Taiwan · TEL: +886-4-7112199</span>

  </p>

</footer>


<script>

function submitForm(e) {

  const name = document.querySelector('.contact-form input[type=text]').value;

  const email = document.querySelector('.contact-form input[type=email]').value;

  const company = document.querySelectorAll('.contact-form input[type=text]')[1].value;

  const msg = document.querySelector('.contact-form textarea').value;

  if (!name || !email || !msg) {

    alert(document.body.classList.contains('lang-en') ? 'Please fill in all required fields.' : '請填寫必要欄位。');

    return;

  }

  const subject = encodeURIComponent('【Constant Fortune 網站詢問】' + company);

  const body = encodeURIComponent('姓名/Name: ' + name + '\n公司/Company: ' + company + '\nEmail: ' + email + '\n\n留言/Message:\n' + msg);

  window.location.href = 'mailto:jinny99@ms45.hinet.net?subject=' + subject + '&body=' + body;

}


function setLang(lang) {

  document.body.className = lang === 'en' ? 'lang-en' : '';

  document.getElementById('btn-zh').classList.toggle('active', lang === 'zh');

  document.getElementById('btn-en').classList.toggle('active', lang === 'en');

  document.documentElement.lang = lang === 'en' ? 'en' : 'zh-TW';

}

</script>


</body>

</html>
